accounts.name: intake_vault
docs: intake vault token account — holds all accumulated fees

accounts.name: caller_program
docs: caller program identity — must be one of the registered slash sources

accounts.name: next_epoch
docs: next epoch to credit the residuals

errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.msg: signer is not authorized for this instruction

errors.name: HookNotAllowed
errors.msg: transfer-hook program is not on the allowlist

errors.name: HookAllowlistFull
errors.msg: hook allowlist is at capacity

errors.name: AgentHookAllowlistFull
errors.msg: per-agent hook allowlist is at capacity

errors.name: InvalidProgramId
errors.msg: program id must be a non-default pubkey

errors.name: MintExtensionRejected
errors.msg: mint extension configuration is not acceptable

errors.name: MintParseFailed
errors.msg: failed to parse Token-2022 mint extensions

errors.name: NoPendingAuthority
errors.msg: no pending authority to accept

errors.name: ReentrancyDetected
errors.msg: reentrancy detected — guard is already active

errors.name: UnauthorizedCaller
errors.msg: caller program is not on the allowed callers list

errors.name: CallerGuardNotActive
errors.msg: caller program's reentrancy guard is not active

errors.name: CpiDepthExceeded
errors.msg: cpi stack height exceeds allowed bound

errors.name: GuardAlreadyActive
errors.msg: reentrancy guard is already active

errors.name: GuardNotInitialized
errors.msg: reentrancy guard has not been initialized

errors.name: AdminResetNotTimelocked
errors.msg: admin reset has not met the 24h timelock

errors.name: Paused
errors.msg: program is paused

errors.name: InvalidBpsSum
errors.msg: bps quadruple must sum to 10000

errors.name: BucketCapExceeded
errors.msg: bucket bps exceeds its hard cap

errors.name: EpochNotOpen
errors.msg: epoch is not in Open status

errors.name: EpochNotElapsed
errors.msg: epoch duration has not elapsed

errors.name: IntakeAccountingDrift
errors.msg: intake vault balance does not match total_collected

errors.name: DistributionAlreadyCommitted
errors.msg: distribution root already committed for this epoch

errors.name: DistributionWindowElapsed
errors.msg: distribution commit window has elapsed

errors.name: MerkleProofInvalid
errors.msg: merkle proof is invalid

errors.name: MerkleProofTooDeep
errors.msg: merkle proof exceeds max depth

errors.name: ClaimOverflow
errors.msg: claim would exceed staker_amount for this epoch

errors.name: ClaimWindowElapsed
errors.msg: claim window has elapsed

errors.name: BurnBelowThreshold
errors.msg: burn amount below minimum threshold

errors.name: BurnAlreadyExecuted
errors.msg: burn already executed for this epoch

errors.name: SweepGraceNotElapsed
errors.msg: sweep grace period has not elapsed

errors.name: AlreadySwept
errors.msg: epoch has already been swept

errors.name: InvalidEpochStatus
errors.msg: invalid epoch status for this operation

errors.name: ArithmeticOverflow
errors.msg: arithmetic overflow

errors.name: CallerNotRegisteredSlasher
errors.msg: caller is not a registered slash source

errors.name: InvalidEpochDuration
errors.msg: epoch duration out of allowed range

errors.name: InvalidClaimWindow
